data.title: Fribl Outbound
data.description: Internal B2B multichannel prospecting platform I built solo at Fribl: LinkedIn + email sequences, a visual workflow builder, unified inbox, CRM, A/B testing and a metrics dashboard. Built end-to-end with TypeScript, Next.js and PostgreSQL, with AI-powered lead enrichment.

data.title: Fribl LinkedIn Scraper
data.description: Python automation tool I built to scrape LinkedIn profiles and enrich candidate data for Fribl's AI recruitment platform. Features data extraction, profile analysis, and seamless integration with recruitment workflows.
